title: FurCraft Client
body:
# 🐾 FurCraft — Minecraft, but Certifiably Pawsome!

Ever dreamed of floofin’ through Minecraft in full furry flair?  
Say hello to **FurCraft**—a modpack that’s as cuddly as it is clever!

## ✨ Features
- ⚙️ Performance optimizations to keep your floofin’ smooth
- 🧰 Useful quality-of-life enhancements
- 🐺 Fluffy-wuffy custom menu screens
- 🎮 A cozy, immersive experience for furry fans and friends alike

## 💖 Why FurCraft?
Whether you're building cozy dens or bounding across biomes, FurCraft makes every moment feel like a cuddle-powered adventure. It’s Minecraft with extra tail wags and toe beans.

So go ahead—boot it up, floof around, and let your inner fuzzball run wild. ^>w<^

## 🔮 Future Plans
(1.26.2+ is on the way)

---

Made with love for the furry community 💕


**(ORIGINAL: [FurryCraft Client](https://modrinth.com/modpack/furrycraft))**
